critic_raw:
CRITIQUE:

C1 — POST-CRISIS WINDOW OPTIMISM: Low default rates 2010–2020 bias PD estimates toward optimism.

C2 — LOAN OFFICER SUBJECTIVITY: Human judgment features introduce unverifiable variance.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE (responding to critic):

C1 — The documentation explicitly acknowledges benign-cycle conditions and provides a stress supplement using 2007–2009 default rate overlays. Stress PDs are computed separately for capital purposes. This is standard commercial credit model governance.

C2 — Loan officer scores are industry-standard. Auditability through consistency reviews and interrater reliability testing is well-established in commercial credit governance. The concern is addressable.
adjudication_raw: Both points resolve to defense in round 1. Stress supplement addresses benign-cycle concern with documented methodology. Loan officer score concern identifies a governance monitoring requirement, not an invalidating flaw.
